game.log.rumor.1: Rumor: rift ruins hide the finest relics, but their guardians do not wake alone.
game.log.rumor.2: Rumor: every forge can strip hidden worth from broken gear if your hands stay steady.
game.log.rumor.3: Rumor: shardside merchants only trust business done under guarded roofs.
game.log.rumor.4: Rumor: the farther you walk, the sharper the steel and the harsher the teeth.
game.log.rumor.5: Rumor: tree lines near the center regrow slowly, so greedy chopping leaves long hungry roads.
game.log.rumor.6: Rumor: shallow ponds feed the patient, but lakes hide deeper rewards and deeper trouble.
game.log.rumor.7: Rumor: coal veins tend to sit where the land already looks half-burned and bitter.
game.log.rumor.8: Rumor: the best armor comes from surviving one more trip than you thought you could.
game.log.rumor.9: Rumor: some ruins look empty until the first step wakes everything inside.
game.log.rumor.10: Rumor: a full pack is safer than a sharp blade right up until the fighting starts.
game.log.rumor.11: Rumor: iron pays for persistence, copper pays for speed, and both punish dull tools.
game.log.rumor.12: Rumor: hunger kills more heroes than wolves ever will.

ui.tooltip.bar.heroXp: Shows progress toward your next level.

ui.tooltip.window.claim: Claim this hex by spending 1 Cloth and 1 Sticks for a banner.

ui.tooltip.window.forfeitCombat: Accept defeat, die, and respawn at your home hex.

ui.tooltip.window.takeAllLoot: Take every item from this tile.
ui.tooltip.window.unclaim: Lower your banner and remove this hex from your territory.

ui.recipeBook.tooltip.batchCraftCtrl: Ctrl-click: craft the maximum possible amount.

ui.secondaryStat.tooltip.blockChance: Gives incoming hits a chance to be blocked completely.
ui.secondaryStat.tooltip.criticalStrikeC: Gives your attacks a chance to become critical hits.
ui.secondaryStat.tooltip.criticalStrikeD: Increases how hard your critical hits land.
ui.secondaryStat.tooltip.dodgeChance: Gives incoming hits a chance to be evaded completely.
ui.secondaryStat.tooltip.lifestealAmount: Restores HP after your damaging hits land, based on your maximum HP.
ui.secondaryStat.tooltip.suppressDamageC: Gives incoming hits a chance to be partially suppressed instead of taking the full damage.

ui.settings.audio.musicMuted.description: Mute only background music while leaving interface sounds and gameplay voice available.
ui.settings.audio.musicMuted.label: Mute music
ui.settings.audio.muted.description: Mute background music, interface sounds, and gameplay voice playback.
ui.settings.audio.muted.label: Mute audio
ui.settings.audio.respectReducedMotion.d: Automatically mute interface sounds when the system prefers reduced motion.
ui.settings.audio.soundEffects.click.des: Play the standard confirmation sound for button and tab clicks.
ui.settings.audio.soundEffects.descripti: Control each synthesized UI sound event independently, including window open and close sounds.
ui.settings.audio.soundEffects.error.des: Play the failure sound for destructive reset and error states.
ui.settings.audio.soundEffects.hover.des: Play the hover sound when interactive controls gain focus or pointer hover.
ui.settings.audio.soundEffects.label: Sound effects
ui.settings.audio.soundEffects.notify.de: Play the notification sound before a settings-triggered reload.
ui.settings.audio.soundEffects.pop.descr: Play the pop sound for window opening and range or select adjustments.
ui.settings.audio.soundEffects.pop.label: Window open and sliders
ui.settings.audio.soundEffects.success.d: Play the success sound after saving settings.
ui.settings.audio.soundEffects.swoosh.de: Play the swoosh sound when windows close or collapse.
ui.settings.audio.soundEffects.toggle.de: Play the toggle sound for on and off switches.
ui.settings.audio.soundEffects.warning.d: Play the warning sound when the reset-save hold begins.
ui.settings.audio.voice.actor.descriptio: Choose which recorded actor performs gameplay voice lines.
ui.settings.audio.voice.actor.label: Voice actor
ui.settings.audio.voice.events.combatAtt: Play battle cries when your attacks or combat abilities land.
ui.settings.audio.voice.events.combatEnd: Play completion lines when combat ends and control returns to exploration.
ui.settings.audio.voice.events.combatExe: Play exertion lines when you dodge, block, absorb, or shrug off hostile effects.
ui.settings.audio.voice.events.descripti: Enable or disable voice playback for each gameplay event category independently.
ui.settings.audio.voice.events.label: Voice events
ui.settings.audio.voice.events.playerDam: Play pain reactions when your character loses health.
ui.settings.audio.voice.events.playerDea: Play death lines when the character is defeated and respawns.
ui.settings.audio.theme.description: Choose the overall tactile character for every synthesized UI sound.
ui.settings.audio.theme.label: Theme
ui.settings.audio.volume.description: Set separate levels for music, interface sound effects, and gameplay voice.
ui.settings.audio.volume.label: Audio volumes
ui.settings.audio.musicVolume.descriptio: Set how loud background tracks play during exploration and combat.
ui.settings.audio.musicVolume.label: Music volume
ui.settings.audio.uiVolume.description: Set how loud interface sounds such as clicks, hovers, and notifications play.
ui.settings.audio.uiVolume.label: UI sounds volume
ui.settings.audio.voiceVolume.descriptio: Set how loud gameplay voice lines are played.
ui.settings.audio.voiceVolume.label: Voice volume
ui.settings.graphics.antialias.descripti: Smooth jagged edges when Pixi creates the renderer.
ui.settings.graphics.antialias.label: Antialias
ui.settings.graphics.autoDensity.descrip: Scale the canvas to match CSS size on high-DPI displays.
ui.settings.graphics.autoDensity.label: Auto density
ui.settings.graphics.clearBeforeRender.d: Clear the previous frame before drawing the next scene.
ui.settings.graphics.preset.balanced.des: Recommended. Caps renderer density at 1.5x for a lighter frame without a large clarity drop.
ui.settings.graphics.preset.custom.label: Custom
ui.settings.graphics.preset.description: Choose how aggressively the world renderer caps pixel density before the next reload.
ui.settings.graphics.preset.label: Renderer preset
Caps renderer density at 1x and disables antialiasing for the lightest GPU load.
ui.settings.graphics.preset.quality.desc: Keeps antialiasing and allows up to 2x renderer density on higher-DPI displays.
Use premultiplied alpha blending for the renderer output.
ui.settings.graphics.preserveDrawingBuff: Keep rendered pixels in the drawing buffer after presenting the frame.
ui.settings.graphics.showTerrainBackgrou: Show biome artwork behind icons on revealed world hexes.
ui.settings.graphics.useContextAlpha.des: Allow the renderer context to keep an alpha channel under the canvas background.
ui.settings.graphics.worldRenderFps.desc: Caps live Pixi world rendering between 60 and 240 FPS.
ui.settings.reloadHint: Reload is required before renderer-init flags affect the world canvas.
ui.settings.saves.areas.audio.descriptio: Clear saved audio preferences and restore the default sound setup on reload.
ui.settings.saves.areas.audio.label: Audio settings
ui.settings.saves.areas.game.description: Clear the saved world, character progress, inventory, and combat state.
ui.settings.saves.areas.game.label: Adventure
ui.settings.saves.areas.graphics.descrip: Clear saved renderer preferences and restore the default graphics setup on reload.
ui.settings.saves.areas.graphics.label: Graphics settings
ui.settings.saves.areas.ui.description: Clear saved window layout, dock visibility, log filters, and action bar slots.
ui.settings.saves.areas.ui.label: Window layout
ui.settings.saves.areas.worldMap.descrip: Clear saved world map zoom and pan offsets and restore the default map view on reload.
ui.settings.saves.areas.worldMap.label: World map
ui.settings.saves.confirm: Reset {area} save data? This removes the stored data for this area and reloads the page.
ui.settings.saves.description: Reset one save area at a time. Each reset removes only that stored area and reloads the page.
ui.settings.saves.title: Saved data
